title: FantasyRPGCraft
description:
FantasyRPGCraft aims to deliver a fun and exciting fantasy adventure as you play through Minecraft with lot's of new content such as

Magic!
New Weapons and Armor!

New Building Blocks and Biomes!
And much more...
body:
FantasyRPGCraft aims to deliver a fun and exciting fantasy adventure as you play through Minecraft with lot's of new content!
 

FantasyRPGCraft includes:
 

Magic!

New Weapons and Armor!

New Combat and Movement!

New Building Blocks and Biomes!

Dungeons and Cities to explore! (or Pillage...)

Gliders to soar through the air!

New Dynamic Music!

And much, much more!
 


This modpack is highly customizable and you can freely disable any content mods you do not like and it will not interfere with the overall gameplay.


This modpack uses Fabulously Optimized as a base, which you can find here [https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)

Thank you!
